cascade.calculation_basis: declared PSCC from utility (already c-corrected); ZQ back-calculated per IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.3.2 as ZQ = c·U/(√3·Ik_declared) = 1.10×11kV/(√3×16kA) = 0.4366 Ω. Ik_min uses c_min=1.00 (HV) per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1.

Three-phase LV terminals: z_total = ZQ_LV + Z_TX_LV per IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.3. ZQ_LV = ZQ_HV × (U_LV/U_HV)² = 0.4366 × (400/11000)² = 0.000577 Ω. Z_TX_LV = u_k × U_LV² / S_tx = 0.05 × 400²/1.6MVA = 0.005 Ω. z_total = 0.005577 Ω. Ik_max = 1.05·400/(√3·0.005577) = 43.49 kA per IEC 60909-0:2016 Table 1 (c_max=1.05 LV).

Busbar internal impedance ≈ negligible vs upstream cascade; z carried from MSB-1 incoming with small monotonic increment (0.000006 Ω) to reflect busbar copper trunk. Ik_max = 1.05·400/(√3·0.007280) = 33.31 kA.

selectivity_implications.recommendation: ACB Icn 65 kA — adequate at 33.34 kA cascade (1.95× margin)
MCCB Icn 25 kA — adequate at 19.27 kA (1.30× margin; verify Ics ≥ Icu at full rating per IEC 60947-2)

assumptions: DNO declared PSCC 16 kA at HV primary; X/R = 5 assumed.
Generator X"d = 0.15 pu assumed (IEC 60909-2 typical for 1 MVA salient pole).
Utility-mode worst case modelled. Gen-mode would give lower Ik"; emit both for full audit when tool runs.
Cable impedance from IEC 60364-5-52 Annex E tables.

rationale.chat_summary: INT commercial 11 kV/400V TPN with 1600 kVA TX + 800 kVA standby genset. 5-node cascade. Ik"max at MSB 33.34 kA (utility-mode worst case; H1+H2 corrected: HV-1 declared 16 kA not re-multiplied by c per §3.3.2; TX-1 z properly sums ZQ_LV + Z_TX_LV per §3.3). ACB 65 kA Icn (1.95× margin) + MCCB 25 kA Icn (1.30× margin) both adequate. Near-from-gen decrement modelled per §3.5. tool_call_pending until calc runs.

sections.title: Source Specification
sections.summary: Two sources modelled: utility transformer (1600 kVA, Zpu 5%) + standby gen (800 kVA, X"d 0.15 pu).

decisions.label: Mixed source modelling
decisions.summary: Utility-mode worst case + gen-mode capability documented.

sections.title: Cascade Topology
sections.summary: 5 nodes engineer-declared. HV → TX → MSB → busbar → DB-L1.

sections.title: HV-side Assumptions
sections.summary: 11 kV primary, ring-main, declared PSCC 16 kA, X/R 5. c_max = 1.10 per Table 1 (HV).

decisions.label: c_max = 1.10 HV
decisions.summary: Per IEC 60909-0 Table 1 for Un > 1 kV.

sections.title: Transformer + Source Impedances
sections.summary: ZQ_HV = c·U_HV/(√3·Ik_declared) = 1.10×11kV/(√3×16kA) = 0.4366 Ω per IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.3.2 (declared PSCC is already c-corrected by utility — back-calculate ZQ FROM it; do NOT re-multiply Ik by c). ZQ_LV = 0.4366 × (400/11000)² = 0.000577 Ω. Z_TX_LV = u_k × U_LV²/S_tx = 0.05 × 400²/1.6MVA = 0.005 Ω. z_total_TX = 0.005577 Ω. X/R_TX = 7.

decisions.label: Declared PSCC anchored, no double-c
decisions.summary: 16 kA at HV-1 stored as-is (NOT 16×1.10=17.6 kA). ZQ_HV back-calculated FROM declared value.

sections.title: Motor Contribution Assessment
sections.summary: Motor load 0 kW; threshold not met.

sections.title: Per-node Ifault Computation
sections.summary: Ik"max range across cascade: HV-1 16.00 kA (declared) → TX-1 43.49 kA → MSB-1 33.34 kA → MSB-1.BUSBAR 33.31 kA → DB-L1 19.27 kA. ipk range 35-102 kA. Each node's z_total reconciles to Ik = c·U/(√3·Z) within 1% tolerance per the new internal-consistency invariant (INV-11). H1+H2 corrected May 2026: TX-1 z previously stored as 0.005 Ω (below transformer-only impedance); now 0.005577 Ω = ZQ_LV + Z_TX_LV. HV-1 previously 17.6 kA = 16×1.10 (double-c); now 16.0 kA exact per §3.3.2.

decisions.label: Internal-consistency reconciliation
decisions.summary: Every node Ik = c·U/(√3·Z) within 1% (LV c_max=1.05 per Table 1; HV uses declared-PSCC convention).
decisions.rule: IEC 60909-0:2016 §3.3 + §4.3 cascade method + fault-level validator INV-11

decisions.label: tool_call_pending across cascade
decisions.summary: Multi-source superposition + near-gen decrement requires deterministic tool execution.

sections.title: Selectivity Implications
sections.summary: ACB Icn 65 kA verified against 33.34 kA at MSB (1.95× margin). DB-L1 MCCB Icn 25 kA verified against 19.27 kA (1.30× margin — verify Ics ≥ Icu at full rating per IEC 60947-2). Both comply with IEC 60364-4-43 §434.5.1.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant. Assumptions captured: utility PSCC, gen X"d, X/R, cable tables.
